subject: Repeated keychain prompts for mail or Wi-Fi password
description: User asked to approve keychain access many times per day for Mail or network login.

ts_steps.title: Keychain First Aid (legacy) / sync
ts_steps.action: Keychain Access — verify login keychain unlocked; check for duplicate Wi-Fi entries.

ts_steps.title: Re-save password
ts_steps.action: Remove saved network or mail account password, re-enter once, allow keychain save.

ts_steps.title: New keychain if corrupted
ts_steps.action: If prompts persist after re-save, backup export critical items; create fresh login keychain per Apple guidance.

internal_information: Corrupt keychain or mismatched account password. iCloud Keychain conflicts less common; escalate if MDM profile blocks keychain repair.
